description_long: This is a modern, light gray upholstered sofa bed with a pull-out extension that transforms it into a sleeping surface. The sofa features a single, wide seat cushion with subtle tufting and a matching backrest, both of which are attached and uniform in size. The armrests are straight, blocky, and padded, positioned at each end of the sofa for a clean, contemporary look. The legs are short, square, and appear to be made of wood or a wood-like material, slightly recessed under the frame for stability. The pull-out section is supported by a visible black metal frame with small wheels for easy extension and retraction. The upholstery is smooth and solid in color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, giving the piece a minimalist and versatile appearance suitable for urban interiors.
description: A modern light gray sofa bed with a pull-out extension, straight padded armrests, and subtle tufted seat detailing. The design is minimalist with smooth, solid upholstery and short, square legs.
description_view_0: The sofa is shown with the pull-out bed extended, revealing the black metal frame and wheels on the left side, with the tufted seat cushion visible on the right.
description_view_1: A direct front view of the fully extended sofa bed, showing both armrests and the seamless, uniform sleeping surface.
description_view_2: The pull-out bed is extended on the right side, exposing the supporting frame and wheels, while the main seat cushion with tufting is on the left.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the sofa bed from the opposite side, highlighting the smooth, continuous surface and both armrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, wide seat and back cushions with subtle tufting, both attached and uniform in size, forming a continuous surface when extended.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, block-style armrests that are padded and extend to the same height as the backrest, with a clean, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, square legs positioned at the corners, likely made of wood or wood-like material, slightly recessed and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with attached cushion, matching the seat in width and tufting detail.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth texture and subtle tufting on the seat and backrest, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
